raw_response:
@certus(
    preconditions=["isinstance(days, int)", "1 <= days <= 31"],
    postconditions=[
        {"when": "month in ('January', 'February')", "guarantees": ["result == 'winter'"]},
        {"when": "month == 'March' and days <= 19", "guarantees": ["result == 'winter'"]},
        {"when": "month == 'March' and days > 19", "guarantees": ["result == 'spring'"]},
        {"when": "month in ('April', 'May')", "guarantees": ["result == 'spring'"]},
        {"when": "month == 'June' and days <= 20", "guarantees": ["result == 'spring'"]},
        {"when": "month == 'June' and days > 20", "guarantees": ["result == 'summer'"]},
        {"when": "month in ('July', 'August')", "guarantees": ["result == 'summer'"]},
        {"when": "month == 'September' and days <= 21", "guarantees": ["result == 'summer'"]},
        {"when": "month == 'September' and days > 21", "guarantees": ["result == 'autumn'"]},
        {"when": "always", "guarantees": ["result in ('winter', 'spring', 'summer', 'autumn')"]}
    ],
)
